title: Magician's Hat
description: A new item used to magically store and expel items as well as become a fashion piece
body:
[![Made for ModFest: Carnival](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModFest/art/v2/badge/svg/carnival/cozy.svg)](https://modfest.net/carnival)

A new item is added to the game that allows you to store items and magically produce them again. Let's not forget that it's quite fashionable as well.

The _Magician's Hat_ works just like a Bundle with a couple of exceptions.

- Holding an item with the hat allows you to place it in the hat.
- With an empty hand you can then make it appear from the hat.
- You can wear it.
- And if you place it down and wave your trusty magician's wand (a stick), you can summon items from the hat in block-form. Fireworks and spawn eggs have special appearances.

Look at the gallery for photos and gifs of the functionality
